utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage (with both physical and mental health insurance and costs, plus totals), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs, specifically photography equipment under home contents), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs, specifically adventure activities), additional_services (enhancement services with costs and discount math), and total_budget (complete combined monthly/annual costs). Each item includes the necessary details and costs. All 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each policy named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. For physical health, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' maps to the primary_health_coverage.physical_health entry with rating 9. For mental health, 'SecureLife Basic Plan' maps to the primary_health_coverage.mental_health entry with rating 8. For photography equipment, 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage (Home Content)' corresponds to 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 10. For travel, 'InsurePlus Standard Plan (Travel Insurance)' corresponds to 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. For additional services: 'Home Office Protection Add-on' matches 'Home Office Protection' under property_enhancement_services with rating 7. The 'Dedicated Professional Liability Policy' is not present in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted.
